definition: A description of the earth: a treatise or textbook on geography; an atlas or gazetteer.
example: We need to understand the concept of geography.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm địa lý.

definition: The third planet of the Solar System; the world upon which humans live.
example: We need to understand the concept of earth.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về trái đất.

definition: (with "the") Human collective existence; existence in general.
example: There will always be lovers, till the world’s end.
exampleVi: Sẽ luôn có những người yêu nhau, cho đến ngày tận thế.

definition: A visual representation of an area, whether real or imaginary.
example: We need to understand the concept of map.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bản đồ.

definition: Each of the main continuous land-masses on the earth's surface, now generally regarded as seven in number, including their related islands, continental shelves etc.
example: We need to understand the concept of continent.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm lục địa.

definition: (chiefly British) An area of land; a district, region.
example: We need to understand the concept of country.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm đất nước.

definition: A historically constituted, stable community of people, formed on the basis of a common language, territory, economic life, ethnicity and/or psychological make-up manifested in a common culture.
example: The Kurdish people constitute a nation in the Middle East
exampleVi: Người Kurd tạo thành một quốc gia ở Trung Đông

definition: A condition; a set of circumstances applying at any given time.
example: We need to understand the concept of state.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm nhà nước.

definition: A large settlement, bigger than a town; sometimes with a specific legal definition, depending on the place.
example: São Paulo is the largest city in South America.
exampleVi: São Paulo là thành phố lớn nhất ở Nam Mỹ.

definition: A settlement; an area with residential districts, shops and amenities, and its own local government; especially one larger than a village and smaller than a city.
example: This town is really dangerous because these youngsters have Beretta handguns.
exampleVi: Thị trấn này thực sự nguy hiểm vì những thanh niên này có súng ngắn Beretta.

definition: A rural habitation of size between a hamlet and a town.
example: There are 2 churches and 3 shops in our village.
exampleVi: Có 2 nhà thờ và 3 cửa hàng trong làng của chúng tôi.

definition: The part of Earth which is not covered by oceans or other bodies of water.
example: Most insects live on land.
exampleVi: Hầu hết côn trùng sống trên cạn.

definition: A substance (of molecular formula H₂O) found at room temperature and pressure as a clear liquid; it is present naturally as rain, and found in rivers, lakes and seas; its solid form is ice and its gaseous form is steam.
example: By the action of electricity, the water was resolved into its two parts, oxygen and hydrogen.
exampleVi: Nhờ tác động của điện, nước được phân giải thành hai phần là oxy và hydro.

definition: A large body of salt water.
example: We need to understand the concept of sea.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về biển.

definition: One of the large bodies of water separating the continents.
example: We need to understand the concept of ocean.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về đại dương.

definition: A large and often winding stream which drains a land mass, carrying water down from higher areas to a lower point, oftentimes ending in another body of water, such as an ocean or in an inland sea.
example: Occasionally rivers overflow their banks and cause floods.
exampleVi: Thỉnh thoảng sông tràn bờ và gây lũ lụt.

definition: A small stream of running water; a channel for water; a drain.
example: We need to understand the concept of lake.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về hồ.

definition: An elevation of land of considerable dimensions rising more or less abruptly, forming a conspicuous figure in the landscape, usually having a small extent of surface at its summit.
example: We spent the weekend hiking in the mountains.
exampleVi: Chúng tôi dành những ngày cuối tuần để đi bộ trên núi.

definition: An elevated location smaller than a mountain.
example: The park is sheltered from the wind by a hill to the east.
exampleVi: Công viên được che chắn gió bởi một ngọn đồi ở phía đông.

definition: An elongated depression between hills or mountains, often with a river flowing through it.
example: We need to understand the concept of valley.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về thung lũng.

definition: a word related to this topic

exampleVi: Đây là một câu ví dụ sử dụng từ viền.

exampleVi: Đây là một câu ví dụ sử dụng từ vốn.

definition: a word related to this topic
example: This is an example sentence using the word population.
exampleVi: Đây là một câu ví dụ sử dụng từ dân số.

definition: (often “the Equator”) An imaginary great circle around the Earth, equidistant from the two poles, and dividing earth's surface into the northern and southern hemisphere.
example: We need to understand the concept of equator.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm đường xích đạo.

definition: A region of the earth or of a continent; a district or country.
example: We need to understand the concept of province.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm tỉnh.

definition: A precise description of a place.
example: We need to understand the concept of topography.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm địa hình.

definition: Angular distance measured west or east of the prime meridian.
example: We need to understand the concept of longitude.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm kinh độ.

definition: A large extent or tract of land; for example a region, country or district.
example: We need to understand the concept of territory.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm lãnh thổ.

definition: The land ruled by a count or a countess.
example: We need to understand the concept of county.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm quận.

definition: The divide between land and a body of water.
example: We need to understand the concept of shoreline.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm đường bờ.

definition: The shape, outline, or boundary of a coast.
example: We need to understand the concept of coastline.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm đường bờ biển.

definition: A single, distinctive rock formation; an area having a preponderance of a particular rock or group of rocks.
example: We need to understand the concept of terrain.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm địa hình.

definition: The part of a country which borders or faces another country or unsettled region
example: We need to understand the concept of frontier.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm biên giới.

definition: Half of the celestial sphere, as divided by either the ecliptic or the celestial equator .
example: We need to understand the concept of hemisphere.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bán cầu.

definition: A district with a government that typically encloses no other governed districts; a borough, city, or incorporated town or village.
example: We need to understand the concept of municipality.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm đô thị.

definition: a word related to this topic
example: This is an example sentence using the word elevation.
exampleVi: Đây là một câu ví dụ sử dụng từ độ cao.

example: This is an example sentence using the word district.
exampleVi: Đây là một câu ví dụ sử dụng từ quận.

definition: a word related to this topic
example: This is an example sentence using the word latitude.
exampleVi: Đây là một câu ví dụ sử dụng từ vĩ độ.

definition: a word related to this topic
example: This is an example sentence using the word demographics.
exampleVi: Đây là một câu ví dụ sử dụng từ nhân khẩu học.

definition: a word related to this topic
example: This is an example sentence using the word suburban.
exampleVi: Đây là một câu ví dụ sử dụng từ ngoại ô.

definition: a word related to this topic
example: This is an example sentence using the word climate.
exampleVi: Đây là một câu ví dụ sử dụng từ khí hậu.

definition: a word related to this topic
example: This is an example sentence using the word urban.
exampleVi: Đây là một câu ví dụ sử dụng từ đô thị.

definition: a word related to this topic
example: This is an example sentence using the word rural.
exampleVi: Đây là một câu ví dụ sử dụng từ nông thôn.

definition: a word related to this topic
example: This is an example sentence using the word metropolis.
exampleVi: Đây là một câu ví dụ sử dụng từ đô thị.

definition: a word related to this topic
example: This is an example sentence using the word vegetation.
exampleVi: This is an example sentence using the word vegetation.

definition: a word related to this topic
example: This is an example sentence using the word altitude.
exampleVi: This is an example sentence using the word altitude.

definition: Conditions suitable for an organism or population of organisms to live.
example: This park offers important amphibian habitat and breeding area.
exampleVi: Công viên này cung cấp môi trường sống và khu vực sinh sản lưỡng cư quan trọng.

definition: The science that deals with the study of the atmosphere and its phenomena, especially with weather and weather forecasting.
example: We need to understand the concept of meteorology.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm khí tượng học.

definition: Plants considered as a group, especially those of a particular country, region, time, etc.
example: We need to understand the concept of flora.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về hệ thực vật.

definition: The science that studies the structure of the earth (or other planets), together with its origin and development, especially by examination of its rocks.
example: We need to understand the concept of geology.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm địa chất.

definition: Any major regional biological community such as that of forest or desert
example: We need to understand the concept of biome.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm quần xã.

definition: The surroundings of, and influences on, a particular item of interest.
example: We need to understand the concept of environment.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm môi trường.

definition: Animals considered as a group; especially those of a particular country, region, time.
example: the fauna of China
exampleVi: hệ động vật của Trung Quốc

definition: The branch of biology dealing with the relationships of organisms with their environment and with each other.
example: We need to understand the concept of ecology.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm sinh thái.

definition: A system formed by an ecological community and its environment that functions as a unit.
example: We need to understand the concept of ecosystem.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm hệ sinh thái.

definition: The science that deals with climates, and investigates their phenomena and causes.
example: We need to understand the concept of climatology.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm khí hậu học.

definition: To inspect, or take a view of; to view with attention, as from a high place; to overlook
example: He stood on a hill, and surveyed the surrounding country.
exampleVi: Anh đứng trên một ngọn đồi và khảo sát vùng đất xung quanh.

definition: The scientific measurement and description of the physical features and conditions of navigable waters and the shoreline.
example: We need to understand the concept of hydrography.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm thủy văn.

definition: The scientific study, or a physical description of mountains
example: We need to understand the concept of orography.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm địa hình.

definition: The discipline which deals with the measurement and representation of Earth, its gravitational field and geodynamic phenomena (polar motion, Earth tides, and crustal motion) in three-dimensional, time-varying space
example: We need to understand the concept of geodesy.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm trắc địa.

definition: The creation of charts and maps based on the layout of a territory's geography.
example: We need to understand the concept of cartography.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bản đồ.

definition: The natural world; that which consists of all things unaffected by or predating human technology, production, and design. (Compare ecosystem.)
example: Nature never lies (i.e. tells untruths).
exampleVi: Tự nhiên không bao giờ nói dối (tức là nói sai sự thật).

definition: Animals, plants, and fungi, not normally domesticated, often to the exclusion of plants, fungi, fish, insects and other invertebrates, and microscopic plants and animals; hence:
example: We need to understand the concept of wildlife.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về động vật hoang dã.
